_comment: Sections loaded dynamically into the dashboard shell at runtime. Add an entry + a folder under sections/<id>/ to add a section. Served over HTTP (e.g. GitHub Pages) — file:// will not work because the loader uses fetch().

sections.title: Campaign Builder
